title: Learn how Professor David J. Malan realized computer science is the field for him.
summary: A video featuring Professor David J. Malan describing how he discovered computer science as his field of study. The content is part of CS50, Harvard University's foundational computer science course, which is available through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare.
writeup: Professor David J. Malan recounts how he came to identify computer science as his field of study. The video sits within CS50, Harvard University's foundational computer science course, which is distributed across edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare. The takeaway is a personal account of arriving at computer science as a chosen path, told by the course's lead instructor.
